name: Trading Platform
description: Paper-trading platform for learning options strategies. Real-time quotes, a strategy builder, and P&L simulation — no real money.
currentGoal: Stream live quotes into the strategy builder without rate-limit issues.
currentTask: Blocked: market-data provider revoked the free WebSocket tier mid-integration.
nextTask: Evaluate replacement data feeds (Polygon vs. Alpaca) and re-abstract the quote adapter.
blockers: Market-data vendor sunset the free WebSocket plan — live quotes are dead until we migrate providers.
Options-chain endpoint requires a paid key; strategy builder greeks are stubbed in the meantime.
recentDecisions: Abstracted all market data behind a QuoteAdapter interface — swapping providers is now localized.
P&L simulation runs fully client-side; no server round-trip per scenario.
Greeks computed with a Black-Scholes util rather than pulling from the vendor.
nextSessionPrompt: BLOCKED on market data. First task: decide Polygon vs Alpaca for quotes + options chains, then implement a new QuoteAdapter behind the existing interface. Greeks are already stubbed via blackScholes.ts so the builder still renders.
